title.en: China-to-Côte d'Ivoire BESS Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入科特迪瓦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入象牙海岸：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Côte d'Ivoire CODINORM standards practice, ANARE-CI / CIE electricity-sector review, fire-safety, 50 Hz grid, IEC evidence, UN 38.3 transport, and China GB baseline expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与科特迪瓦CODINORM标准实践、ANARE-CI / CIE电力部门审查、消防安全、50Hz电网、IEC证据、UN 38.3运输及中国GB基线要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與象牙海岸CODINORM標準實務、ANARE-CI / CIE電力部門審查、消防安全、50Hz電網、IEC證據、UN 38.3運輸及中國GB基線要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, CODINORM scope determination, ANARE-CI authorization, CIE / CI-ENERGIES grid-connection approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Côte d'Ivoire standards, electricity-sector, fire, grid, transport, and customs requirements with qualified local professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、CODINORM适用范围裁定、ANARE-CI授权、CIE / CI-ENERGIES并网批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格当地专业人士核验现行科特迪瓦标准、电力部门、消防、电网、运输及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、CODINORM適用範圍裁定、ANARE-CI授權、CIE / CI-ENERGIES併網批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格當地專業人士核驗現行象牙海岸標準、電力部門、消防、電網、運輸及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Côte d'Ivoire, no single public universal BESS product certificate was identified in the official sources reviewed. The practical gap is to confirm the CODINORM import / conformity route, prepare IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 evidence where requested by CODINORM, the project owner, insurer, lender, ANARE-CI, CIE, or CI-ENERGIES, obtain UN 38.3 transport evidence, and handle ANARE-CI / CIE grid and ONPC fire-safety review at project level.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口科特迪瓦时，在已审阅官方来源中未识别到单一公开、普遍适用的BESS产品证书。实际差距是确认CODINORM进口/符合性路径，在CODINORM、项目业主、保险方、贷款方、ANARE-CI、CIE或CI-ENERGIES要求时准备IEC 62619和IEC 62933证据，取得UN 38.3运输证据，并按项目层面处理ANARE-CI / CIE并网及ONPC消防安全审查。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口象牙海岸時，在已審閱官方來源中未識別到單一公開、普遍適用的BESS產品證書。實際差距是確認CODINORM進口／符合性路徑，在CODINORM、項目業主、保險方、貸款方、ANARE-CI、CIE或CI-ENERGIES要求時準備IEC 62619和IEC 62933證據，取得UN 38.3運輸證據，並按項目層面處理ANARE-CI / CIE併網及ONPC消防安全審查。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
